name: hono-prisma-betterauth
description: Standalone Hono + Prisma + better-auth backend preset speaking the open-dashboard wire contract (json-server REST products + remote better-auth). The Prisma sibling of hono-drizzle-betterauth.

scripts.pretest: SQLITE_PATH=./test.db bun run scripts/prisma.ts generate && SQLITE_PATH=./test.db bun run scripts/prisma.ts push
